emails.subject: ETS STAFF MEETING - Jan. 2
emails.body: ETS STAFF MEETING Jan. 2 Will we have a meeting on Jan. 2 in your office (pre-ETS staff meeting)? If so, will it be at 8:30 or can it be 9:00 am? --Dot Forwarded by Dorothy McCoppin/FGT/Enron on 12/11/2000 03:49 PM Stanley Horton 12/11/2000 01:03 PM Sent by: Cindy Stark
